Tweet by @svpino (Santiago)
Author bio: Computer scientist. I teach hard-core AI/ML Engineering at https://t.co/THCAAZcBMu. YouTube: https://t.co/pROi08OZYJ
Text: Google keeps sharing a ton of free content!

Here is one of their most complete examples: a long-running AI agent that pauses, resumes, and never loses context.

It simulates the onboarding of a new employee.

There are the 3 architectural patterns you'll learn from this: https://t.co/ScgJs7BiVH
